title: Data Types Path
description: Build fluency in Data Types inside Data Representation by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Sequential Data
steps.summary: Data that has a temporal or sequential structure, such as time series data or natural language text. It sits inside Data Representation / Data Types. Compare it with Numeric Data and Categorical Data.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Numeric Data
steps.summary: Numeric Data belongs to the Data Representation area of AI/ML, within Data Types. It sits inside Data Representation / Data Types. Compare it with Discrete Numeric Data and Continuous Numeric Data. It opens into Discrete Numeric Data and Continuous Numeric Data.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Categorical Data
steps.summary: Categorical Data belongs to the Data Representation area of AI/ML, within Data Types. It sits inside Data Representation / Data Types. Compare it with Ordered Categorical Data and Nominal Categorical Data. It opens into Nominal Categorical Data and Ordered Categorical Data.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Continuous Numeric Data
steps.summary: Continuous Numeric Data belongs to the Data Representation area of AI/ML, within Data Types. It sits inside Data Representation / Data Types. Start after Numeric Data. It opens into Continuous Numeric Data Handling.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Discrete Numeric Data
steps.summary: Discrete Numeric Data belongs to the Data Representation area of AI/ML, within Data Types. It sits inside Data Representation / Data Types. Start after Numeric Data.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Ordered Categorical Data
steps.summary: Ordered Categorical Data belongs to the Data Representation area of AI/ML, within Data Types. It sits inside Data Representation / Data Types. Start after Categorical Data.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Nominal Categorical Data
steps.summary: Nominal Categorical Data belongs to the Data Representation area of AI/ML, within Data Types. It sits inside Data Representation / Data Types. Start after Categorical Data.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
